summary: First overnight shift. Built Mission Control dashboard and AI Demo Generator service. Fixed Codex CLI integration. Both tested and working locally.
details:
Mission Control: Full dark-theme dashboard with project tracker, task queue, decision log, and morning briefing section. Data-driven by JSON files.

AI Demo Generator: Node.js service with webhook endpoint, URL validation, job queue, GHL API client, widget injection, and monitoring dashboard. Tested locally — webhook accepts requests, validates URLs, and queues jobs correctly. Replit cloning module stubbed awaiting credentials.

Infrastructure: Installed Codex CLI (was missing, causing silent ACP failures), restarted gateway.
tasksCompleted: Built AI Demo Generator orchestration service
Installed Codex CLI and fixed ACP integration
tasksStarted: Railway deployment for demo generator (needs account setup)
